name: Tomato-Basil Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup quinoa grain (substitute more flour if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine boiling water with sun-dried tomato halves, soak for 10 minutes, drain, and cool to room temperature. Snip into 1/4-inch pieces with scissors.
2. Add all ingredients in the order suggested by your bread machine manual or process by hand (or by machine) according to manufacturers' directions.
3. If using a bread machine: Let dough rise in a lightly sprayed bowl, punch down, shape into loaf, place in lightly sprayed loaf pan, and bake at 350°F for approximately 20-25 minutes until browned and done.
4. If kneading by hand: Shape dough into loaf, place in lightly sprayed loaf pan, let rise, then bake at 350°F for approximately 20-25 minutes until browned and done.
